description: Create a small client-side API layer for the Vite patient app so components do not hard-code fetch details everywhere. Scope: wrap relative /api/* calls for intake bootstrap/privacy/precheck, onboarding start/consent/MDI patient/bootstrap/submit, auth session, dashboard, workflow redirects, billing payment method, and subscription cancel; normalize JSON parsing and public error codes; support no-store/cache-busting where needed; include CSRF token propagation for protected mutations; keep opaque IDs only and avoid logging sensitive response data. Acceptance criteria: migrated components use the API client; tests cover successful and failing response shapes; API base remains relative for CloudFront and can be proxied locally.
title: Add Vite patient app API client layer for /api contracts
